properties.title: ['Mt. Kenya', 'Mount Kenya']
properties.description: The station is situated above Moses Camp on the northern upper slopes of Mt. Kenya in a wildlife preserve above the tree line and provides measurements of the tropical mid-troposphere as well as air from the lower humid boundary layer. Access is along Sirimon Route, a distance of 21km from the Nanyuki-Timau main road. The turn-off is about 16km from Nanyuki. A new settlement has been created in the former forest land after the turn-off. The asphalt / concrete road leads up to Old Moses camp, beyond which a rugged footpath leads to the station. The station itself consists of 2 cargo containers with expansions and sanitary facilities on site. One of the containers host the instrument racks.
